debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) = exp (b ^ 2) - exp (a ^ 2)

failed_attempts:
have h : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) x := by
    intro x _
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x => x ^ 2) (2 * x) x := by
      have := hasDerivAt_pow 2 x
      simp at this
      ring_nf
      ring_nf at this
      exact this
    exact HasDerivAt.exp this
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h (by continuity)]

have h : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) x := by
    intro x _
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x => x ^ 2) (2 * x) x := by
      have := hasDerivAt_pow 2 x
      simp at this

      ring_nf at this
      exact this
    exact HasDerivAt.exp this
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h (by continuity)]

have h : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) x := by
    intro x _
    have : HasDerivAt (fun x => x ^ 2) (2 * x) x := by
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x => x ^ 2) (2 * x ^ 1) x := hasDerivAt_pow 2 x
      simp at this
      linarith [this]
    convert HasDerivAt.exp this using 1
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h (by continuity)]
  done
